properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v4 v1 v5 v3 v4 v4 v4 v4 v6 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your kindness leads me to repentance Your goodness draws me to Your side

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your mercy calls me to be like You Your favor is my delight

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every day, I'll awaken my praise And pour out a song from my heart

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are good, You are good You are good, and Your mercy is forever

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your mercy calls me to be like You And Your favor is my delight

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Your kindness is forever, Your goodness is forever Your mercy is forever, forever
